attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
RFWTY.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
,NBM.PRODUCT_KEY 
,NBCM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
,NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE 
,NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 
,NBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
,NBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE 
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE 
,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
,NBM.CANCELLED_FLG 
,NBM.ACQUISITION_FLG 
,NBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG 
,NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG 
,NBCM.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG 
,NBM.OVERLAY_FLG 
,NBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG 
,NBM.CHARGES_FLG 
,NBM.SALESREP_FLG 
,NBM.MISC_FLG 
,NBM.SERVICE_FLG 
,NBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG 
,NBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG 
,NBM.REVENUE_FLG 
,NBM.RMA_FLG 
,NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT 
,'UNKNOWN' DV_DISCOUNT_BAND_CD
,'UNKNOWN' DV_ORDER_BAND_CD
,CASE WHEN NBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'N' 
   THEN 'PRODUCT'
WHEN NBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND NPT.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID NOT IN ('TECHDOC', 'TRAINING' ) 
   THEN 'CA SERVICE'
   ELSE 'OTHER SERVICE' END  AS DV_CA_BOOKINGS_TYPE_CD
 ,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ) 
,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT )
,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT ) 
,SUM(NBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY ) 
,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT )
,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT)
,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT )
,SUM(NBM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY ) 
,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT )
,SUM(NBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT ) 
,NBCM.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
,NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG	 /*Added as part of True Demand Booking Definition */
,NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG 				 	/*Added as part of True Demand Booking Definition */
,  'CORE'  AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD   /* Added as part of Qwin*/
,NBM.DV_FMV_FLG/*FMV Q2FY15*/
,NBM.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,NBM.ACQUISITION_ROLE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE NBM
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM
ON ( NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE =NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE)
INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN NPT 
ON ( NBM.PRODUCT_KEY = NPT.ITEM_KEY )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFWTY
ON (NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=RFWTY.CALENDAR_DATE )
WHERE NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG ='Y'  /*Modified as part of True Demand Booking Definition */
AND NBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')/*ICPM_FEBFY15*/
AND NBM.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG = 'N'
GROUP BY 
RFWTY.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
,NBM.PRODUCT_KEY  
,NBCM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
,NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE 
,NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 
,NBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
,NBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE 
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE 
,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
,NBM.CANCELLED_FLG 
,NBM.ACQUISITION_FLG 
,NBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG 
,NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG 
,NBCM.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG 
,NBM.OVERLAY_FLG 
,NBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG 
,NBM.CHARGES_FLG 
,NBM.SALESREP_FLG 
,NBM.MISC_FLG 
,NBM.SERVICE_FLG 
,NBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG 
,NBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG 
,NBM.REVENUE_FLG 
,NBM.RMA_FLG 
,NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT 
/* The below commented for to increasing performance */
/*,NSOFB.DV_DISCOUNT_BAND_CD 
,NSOFB.DV_ORDER_BAND_CD */
,CASE WHEN NBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'N' 
   THEN 'PRODUCT'
WHEN NBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND NPT.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID NOT IN ('TECHDOC', 'TRAINING' ) 
   THEN 'CA SERVICE'
   ELSE 'OTHER SERVICE' END
 ,NBCM.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
,NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /*Added as part of True Demand Booking Definition */
,NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /*Added as part of True Demand Booking Definition */
,NBM.DV_FMV_FLG/*FMV Q2FY15*/
,NBM.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,NBM.ACQUISITION_ROLE
